positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical celestial fauna composition. Central to the image is a magnificent, symmetrical lunar moth with delicate, geometric wings patterned in deep indigo, copper, and ethereal gold. The moth is surrounded by interwoven abstract cosmic elements: glowing nebulae swirls, stylized crescent moons, and geometric constellations of minimal line art. The composition should be strictly contained and framed for a textile print, featuring strong silhouettes against a contrasting deep space gradient. Art style: High-detail cosmic psychedelic art, combining the precision of Art Nouveau linework with the depth of space-age geometry. Flat design elements should maintain crisp edges and vibrant, limited color palette (indigo, copper, gold, off-black). Clean, symmetrical, high contrast, vector illustration, 8k, perfect symmetry.
